name: superdev
description: Three-skill engineering workflow: team-brainstorm (multi-agent feature design), superdev (max-effort dev workflow), team-code-review (multi-agent code review). End-to-end pipeline enforces plan-before-code, TDD, parallel-first execution, single-bundle approval with all-predicted-permissions, staff-engineer review before any user-facing artifact, continuous execution between checkpoints, and cross-disciplinary debate phases (UI/UX, two same-platform engineers, opposite-platform engineer for cross-pollination, backend, QA) for both brainstorming and review.
